name: The Room VR: A Dark Matter

reviews.review_description: ... with some fiendish puzzles. Completed it without using hints but certainly did some serious head-scratching along the way! Would have liked it to have been a longer play, given the price, but still desperately hoping for more 'The Room' action in the very near future! Jump to it, team!

Omg - please make more like these, hints are subtle n not a give away. I pay any price if you come out with more games just like this one. Please please. I also owe all The Room games on IPad. I wish I would’ve not bought the Ghost town - it’s not even close to The Room VR - it’s like day n nite - Ghost Town the moving around sucks - u have to throw boots around n graphics are not the same either - it was a waste of my money. Stay with just The Room VR and save the money for when they come out with a new one soon. I hope n pray they will

I love the room games (I have them all) and this vr title truly lives up to the name! With intricate puzzels, intriging story, and good graphics (especially on quest 3). If Fireproof Games may read this I would say great job and might I suggest a locomotion option instead of just teleporting, it would really allow the player to explore the world in deeper detail. Also, having the original games on vr would also be awesome, but I understand that to be a little difficult.(but if you could...) Keep up the great work!

This is the first interactive adventure game that I have purchased for my quest3. I am an older player and really not interested in shoot um up, gonna die type of games.
The graphics on this adventure game are excellent and the intricate puzzles that you must solve really are brain challenging teasers.
It was great fun but I wish it was longer.
I would recommend it to everyone.

reviews.review_title: Wasted my money on a teleport snap turn
reviews.review_description: Video is a bit misleading if you ask me. Making it look like you can walk around normally, but to move around you have to teleport. No smooth turn option either so forced to use snap turn. Thought I could turn around naturally on a chair or standing but then every time you teleport, you’ll get switched back to the default position. Either facing sideways or backwards.  As much as I want to play this, I can’t. I tried a second time there but it’s just not worth it.
I loved this game! It was so fun, but I finished it so fast. Not worth $24 to finish in two full  headset sessions .

You know the first time you played the original Portal game and you were like "Where did this come from!? That was so much fun!" This was like that. Short, self-contained, but what they did they did really well. More please!
I really loved this game. Lots of unique puzzles to solve with hints if needed. Would really like to see more like this one.

I'm an older user and found this perfect for me as beginner. Just challenging enough to hold my interest but fair enough that I was able to complete it.

The graphics are amazing and intricate. I loved this game.
My family love it

Virtually no chance of motion sickness. It’s chill, challenging and immersive. Nice graphics, sound and overall atmosphere. Lots of variety of puzzles. There’s no timer so you can play at your own pace. I highly recommend it.
best
Played it every night after work and on weekends, it was just soooo good, had to play it, now one stage left, and so sad dont want to see it end

Snap and teleport controls are the only options for this game?  Are you serious?  I guess I made the mistake of of playing Ghost Town before I played The Room.  Ghost Town’s controls are great. The Room’s controls?  Not so much.  I realize this was an earlier game, but the inability to change the control settings to “smooth” is just unfathomable to me.
This game was the reason I bought the Quest 3 and it's still one of the best games I've ever played!  Beautifully done, great story, and fun, creative puzzles! This game is near perfection!

reviews.review_title: One of the best puzzles in VR
reviews.review_description: I think this game is alongside Red Matter games and Ghost Town, one of the best puzzles in VR. It has cool puzzles and great graphics which makes the game very immersive.
Challenging and great storytelling.  Can't wait for part 2!!
Excellent, high quality puzzles. Very tactile, immersive, spooky, creative. A+.

Puzzles were delightful, neither being too easy that it's boring or too difficult that it's frustrating. The hint system was nice in the case that you forgot you found something or happened to miss something. Felt very fair. 

Between this, Ghost Town, and Tammuz, VR puzzles might just have become my favorite VR genre

reviews.review_title: All I can say is WOW!
reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed the game; it reminded me of Ghost Town. My only complaint is that it was too short. It should be longer and more challenging. Other than that, I gave it 5 stars.

reviews.review_title: Fab even though I'm bad at puzzles 😅
reviews.review_description: Definitely recommend for anyone who likes solo puzzle games, was like an escape room vibe with lots of areas to discover and an Alice in Wonderland feel to some parts too, which I thoroughly enjoyed & wasn't expecting.... Thanks loads to the Devs, I've just started Ghost Town and the immersion you deliver in both games is amazing!! Thanks lots 👌🏾
My favorite game I've played on the quest 🩷

reviews.review_title: Classic top tier vr puzzle room...
reviews.review_description:
My review scale*
5- Amazing game, while still might not be perfect any flaws are forgivable, is well worth your time
4- Good game, might have a few minor issues or missed opportunities keeping it from being better, but is very playable and still an enjoyable experience
3- Mid tier game, not great but not awful, these games can go either way depending on who you are or what you want or expect out of the game
2- Not a very good game, but not completely broken or unplayable, you might really need to want to play this game to get any enjoyment out of it
1- Awful game, broken or unplayable, I don't see these games being for anyone unless significant updates fix the game

*This is an overly simplified review scale since meta does not allow for half stars so in some cases I may round a game up or down depending on a case by case scenario, 
my reviews are always honest and in no way swayed by anybody else and regardless if I received a game for free or not, these ratings and reviews are however part of a 
campaign for us as consumers to be better about reviewing games and helping bring the games we love the attention they deserve.

reviews.review_title: My first game finished on VR
reviews.review_description:
If u want a chill puzzle game tha has some great puzzles not to hard but not to easy either, this game is perfect
The story is okish nothing to fancy but the game looks good and its a great time spender
I actually preffer more this type of movememt (point and click) for this type of game rather than free roam
Ambiance and sounds are also good, really transports u into the game atmosphere
All in all, i would recommand this game to my friends and all VR Heads out there!
GL&HF
A lot of work has gone into this. It’s paid off. Great immersion, well thought out tasks. Enjoy.

I’ve been hoping these devs would release new games. VR Room - Dark Matter hooked me on VR. 

Highly recommend!

The newest game seems to be in a bundle that costs what I already paid for Dark Matter. I’m not going to pay that to get a new game.

Is it not available alone?
Ive been playing TheRoom games since i was 8 honestly love these games

I’ve had this game in my library for YEARS!!!! I finally sat down to play it and I LOVED it. I need more!! The puzzles were fun and not OVERLY challenging. However there were some that made me put down the headset and take a break. Can’t wait to play other games from this studio. Well done.
Really well balanced puzzle. I only whished it was longer .. Or there will be a second part.
This is a classic puzzle game to me. Ive played it several times and it keeps being fun. I only wish the devs would make some more

I played Ghost Town first and just finished The Room. Both are great games! I like the way you can move in Ghost Town more, little more freedom of movement. The puzzles were hard enough to make me think but not so hard that I would give up. I did use the hints a few times, helped me along. They both were very short games but I really had fun playing them. Great job Devs!!

I will say I got the game to try it out based on good
 reviews and based on dev most recent game ghost town also been getting a lot of praise. This game is really good and I wish it was a bit longer. The puzzles are good and  generally not too hard, they do lack some explanation for a few of them. An additional small complain is toward no clear sign what changed after some puzzles are done it's not common but got me on a few occasions waste a few minutes going around thinking what is available to solve now. Yes there is a hint system but I would advise not to use it unless you are really stuck. Hints are ok do not reveal solutions just give idea. I do wish there was a manual save or chapter selection.

The game is a great length. The puzzles require you to pay attention but are never frustrating. The environments are cool. No real complaints. Would be nice if it felt a bit less static, if i felt like i needed to actuall rumage around or sesrch the environments, but as its playable sitting everything is always kinda right infront of you. Still its a minor complaint. Great overall.

The room, whether on iPad or in 3D, is just a fantastic experience. You absolutely have to play this game if you like puzzles. The design is impressive and the mechanics are really interesting to discover and solve. I would gladly pay any price any time to get more games like this one.

reviews.review_title: One of the BEST Puzzle games for VR
reviews.review_description: I’ve had this game for awhile on my oculus but since I got my new Meta Quest 3 which is light years more comfortable to play now, I decided to give it a go again and start over. The graphics are awesome and if you’re a big puzzle/riddle person you’ll love this one. The puzzles are just difficult enough that it keeps you on your toes. I’ve played a few other puzzle games like I expect you to die 1, 2, and 3, but this one by far is at the top of my list. Will definitely be looking into other games made by them. You won’t be disappointed and you’ll lose track of time. It’s that good!

This was a really fun game to play. I finished it too fast but I had a hard time putting it down. Was a little dark at times but still loved it! Please make more games like this. It’s hard to find VR games that are good clean fun.

I just finished The Room today, I really enjoyed the game.  Solving the puzzles to go on to the next room had me thinking and sometimes resorting to the clues to help solve part of the puzzles.  With the VR experience I felt like I was in each room!  Will definitely play this game again!

reviews.review_title: The best escape series you can play.
reviews.review_description: I'm an avid lover of escape games. boxes, doors, rooms. I stumbled upon the room on my phone and was hooked. After I blew through all 4 of them, I was genuinely depressed that NOTHING has come close to how amazing they were. Then I found out they made the 5th game in VR. Any amazing thing I say will be an understatement to how this game is in VR. I hate getting to the end. I'm sure I'll replay it, but I genuinely hope they make a VR series or another game... anywhere. It could come out in smoke signals for all I care. Now,  I have to wander through life knowing I'll never be as satisfied. Just buy the game. Oh and putting the small touches from the last 4 games was just *chefs kiss.
Kept bringing surprises and joy all the way through. Looks great on my quest 2
This was super fun, creative and immersive. We enjoyed playing and watching others play it. Very thought provoking and well done.
Really enjoyed playing this - the puzzles were well thought out and challenging in places.  The puzzles are varied and the game did not feel repetitive.  Good value for money.

I think my biggest mistake was playing ghost town first and the room second. My expectations were so high after ghost town that I was certain the room would be up to par! I DID enjoy the game and found the puzzles to be super intricate (which I love) but the ending was incredibly underwhelming. I was so excited to finally enter the white doorway and for it to be like 3 puzzles… :((( 

rip
Loved it! Came to this after Ghost Town and enjoyed it just as much 😀
A true masterpiece. Good graphics and atmosphere, puzzles that are original and the hints are very well thought of. Loved playing it.
Really enjoyed the puzzles and story line. It had different themed rooms which really got us into the game. Would definitely recommend for a puzzle solving game.

This game was absolutely riveting and hard to put down.  the puzzles were not so difficult that this 70 year old brain couldn't figure them out.  The effects were fabulous.  Kudos to the people at fireproof games!
great game the puzzles were challanging but not to hard.. Loved it

reviews.review_title: It was amazing everything was so detail
reviews.review_description: It was amazing it was so detailed to every little thing making me feel like I was actually in it
Highly recommend this game. Great graphics and a very emersive experience.
It was challenging enough to be fun but not frustrating. If you want a super relaxed game you can play with hints on.

I've been a fan of The Room series for quite some time. When I saw there was a VR entry, I had to get it. The games themselves are very fun, clever, and challenging. With a hint of a dark, Lovecraftian touch. This team are the undisputed masters of these types of games, and this entry is their best work yet. The fun and logical puzzles are just enough of a challenge to keep you engaged without making you frustrated. Even if you do get stuck, there are some hints you can use to point you in the right direction or if you're REALLY stuck, they can just give you the answer after a few hint requests.

Don't hesitate to give this a shot. It's worth not just your cash, but your time.

The game isn't so long that you just want to give up. Well built puzzles in different environments that are sure to please any escape room enthusiasts without being too difficult. Accessible and confortable blink movements.

I hope that you've played the four mobile (and PC?) games of The Room Series.

If you haven't, go do it. The story is minimal until 3 and A Dark Matter, but they're worth it.

If you've played and enjoyed them, or are just discovering The Room in VR...you won't be disappointed. This *IS* the king of independent/small company puzzle games, and it is absolutely worth the buy if you enjoy brain teasers. 

It isn't just puzzles, but a haunting narrative.
great puzzle game. whens thenext one 😀
I am knew to VR and quite old but found this game fantastic really immersive great puzzles and fantastic graphics highly recommend
This was a great short puzzle game. It had a compelling story, good graphics and audio. The ending was a little underwhelming, but the puzzles were super fun.
Top Graphics and an immersive story line!  Well worth the price, time and effort!
I absolutely love this game! I’m going to play it atleast 100x
This is ghe best vr game I have ever played. I wanted to keep going forever. I truly hope Fireproof games makes vr sequel!

reviews.review_title: This is a FANTASTIC VR game!!
reviews.review_description:
If you’ve played any of the Room series on iPad, then you know just how good the graphics and puzzles are. Playing in VR, this new chapter elevates the experience even further. 

This is an epic must own game, and I can’t recommend it enough. If you’re someone who suffers with motion sickness in VR, let me reassure you that the movement controls in this game are well designed and you’ll be fine.

I really hope there’s a sequel!!
This is by far the best game I’ve played in VR. You won’t be disappointed. Hope they come out with a new one soon.
I wish it was longer.  I love these type of games.  A little pricey though.

Just finished this game, the puzzles were really good and were real headscratchers at times, but all fun to do, I really loved the whole experience. Please can we have more like this, but alot longer, thanks for the great entertainment.
Better than Ghost Town!
I absolutely love this this; lots of variety, detailed graphics, not too hard but definitely not easy which requires you to pay attention and think. Extremely enjoyable.
I love a puzzle game that's a little creepy, but not full of cheap jump scares. This fit the bill and I had a ton of fun playing!

This game is what VR headsets were built for. The game kept me occupied and thinking, great graphics, great puzzles had me scratching my head at times. My only criticism it was too short I really wanted it to go on. I want more please.

This was the first game I played on VR over two years ago and hooked me. I played the room way back when it came out for phone/tablet and loved the story. The VR version did not disappoint. I hope one day they’ll come out with a new one, with smooth movement rather than only teleported site. One of my favorite things in VR is exploring the environment.
A little sad when it ended, thoroughly enjoyed it. Great story, amazing graphics. Different to Ghost Town, less freedom of movement, but still brilliant.
Awesome game . Like to see more like it
I played Ghost town and I hope there will be another one and then I played this game the Room and it was awesome. I hope there will be more like this coming soon.

This game is super fun, and it unfolds into something amazing. You think you've seen it all, but there's more.
Beautiful and super creative.
Loved the game, and I'll play it again.
I absolutely enjoyed this game!  Please keep them coming!

I'm a huge fan of this series, and have played all four of the previous games over and over, so with this and Ghost Town coming out, it's no exaggeration to say that I bought the Quest 3 just to play Fireproof games. The Room VR: A Dark Matter does not disappoint. It's an extension and expansion of the same eerie cosmic horror and steampunk-style puzzles of the previous four games, and the VR element means that this is by far the most atmospheric of any of the series to date. It blew me away, frankly. 

In terms of gameplay, Room devotees should be aware that A Dark Matter is both much shorter and a little easier than the last two games in the series. We have a tiny introductory chapter that includes a tutorial, same as every other Room game, followed by three in-depth chapters exploring puzzles laid out in specific locations, and a short concluding chapter where the puzzles are less riddles to be solved and more pieces to put into place to allow the single ending to occur. Like many other reviewers, I would urge you to avoid the hints feature - or even turn it off - it's more rewarding if you figure it out for yourself.

Story is a huge thing for me with this series. I love that we've had more lore and characterisation as the series has progressed. Without any spoilers, the story to this game involves callbacks to all of the last three games, and provides a rich and rewarding conclusion to the series for committed fans. I would love to see the series continue, but if Fireproof are intent on moving on from The Room and the Null, then this is a wonderful finale. Brilliant stuff.
I enjoyed the unique graphics throughout the game. The experience was really cool! Highly recommend this one.
A perfect balance of challenging and interesting. Definitely worth playing to completion.

I’m pretty new to VR and recently got into puzzle/escape room games. The Room VR was amazing! The puzzles are clever, the graphics are stunning, and the atmosphere is incredibly immersive. My only complaint is that I wish it was longer! I’ll definitely be looking into Ghost Town next.
Engaging and fun. I played this after Ghost Town and clearly I have a new favourite game maker

Was really enjoying the game. Then got to the globe with the 4 lights in.. only I only had 2 lights,  so couldn’t go any further. So, started a new profile in which the globe was fine. I’m now completely stuck in the witches cottage as I cannot get the finger to burn on the shape. Have read up/ watched videos/ restarted everything/uninstalled/installed to no avail.  I’ve been over both problems numerous times but no change. So atm unless spending has the  I’m stuck and frustrated.

reviews.review_title: Room vr is great follower of mobile ones
reviews.review_description: i enjoyed this interesting journey to the Null. Highly recomend as relaxing training for the brains for several evenings
